sample.n.id: I tried to update vehicles on my policy. I was told over half a dozen times that the problem was escalated and it never was. It had been over two weeks and no update on my account or my billing to reflect the vehicle changed since September 20 when I asked for the request. Two weeks is way too long to not have an update or proof on my account for insurance on a vehicle. When I asked for a document stating that I wanted to remove two vehicles on September 20 until current and add another vehicle since September 20 until current and that my bill needed to reflect that the document they sent me was completely wrong you guys do not listen and you do not care. I will not be paying my bill until you guys fix your issues.

sample.n.id: But the reason as to y'all's city rating is because y'all lie. I filed this claim on Monday, Thursday now, and y'all are just now asking me for payment information that I had already provided on Monday. I state that y'all just lie, y'all still for customers, y'all don't do what y'all, what time's job is, you know, I pay you for a service, y'all don't provide it whenever people actually need it, y'all have made me lose a lot of money because I am a business owner and I haven't had a phone, thanks to y'all. What else? I don't think that anybody should ever buy y'all services because y'all don't do what y'all are supposed to do. All right.

task_results.question: How is the replacement cost value (RCV) determined for building coverage?

sample.n.id: Our hardest part was not the device replacement, but getting help at the store. We needed to transfer data from a broken device to the new device. The first store we went to barely helped us at 14 Mile near I 75 in Troy, MI. They switched the sim card and that was it, reminding us that they closed soon. The next day we went to a T-Mobile at Square Lake Rd and Rochester Rd in Troy, MI. The screen was more black so it was even harder to work on it, they tried and succeeded at erasing the device and we were able to mail it back. The first location did not even try. Though doing the replacement form was fast, easy and we got the new device the next day. Very satisfied with that experience. Thank you!
There’s nothing more you can do to improve my experience. You did it all already (unless you can do same-day replacements, lol).
The price for a replacement phone was definitely too high!?
